title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
Video KYC is a quick and easy way to open savings account from the comforts of your home. It ensures that the online journey for opening savings account remains safe, simple, and fast eliminating the need to visit the branch for KYC 
(You can carry out the video KYC on any day except Bank Holidays between 8 AM and 10 PM)

metadata.description: IDBI Bank Senior citizen deposits helps you to grow your savings with the power of compounding. Invest systematically and see your savings grow
metadata.keywords: Senior Citizen deposits, recurring deposits interest rates, rd, rd account
